title: Kraken-Incubated Ink Upgrades to Optimism’s OP Enterprise Fully Managed in Multi-Year Infrastructure Deal
summary: Ink, a Kraken-incubated project, has partnered with Optimism to outsource its production infrastructure. Under the multi-year deal, Optimism will run Ink's infrastructure while the Ink Foundation focuses on ecosystem growth and new financial products.
body:
Ink, a blockchain project incubated by the crypto exchange Kraken, has upgraded to Optimism’s OP Enterprise Fully Managed infrastructure. This multi-year deal will see Optimism take over the production infrastructure for Ink, allowing the Ink Foundation to concentrate on expanding its ecosystem and developing new financial products.

Under the agreement, Optimism will run Ink's production infrastructure, ensuring reliability and scalability. This partnership is expected to enhance Ink’s operational efficiency and allow the foundation to focus on strategic initiatives. The deal underscores the growing trend of blockchain projects outsourcing their infrastructure needs to specialized providers.

For everyday users, this partnership means that Ink’s services are likely to become more robust and reliable. By offloading infrastructure management to Optimism, the Ink Foundation can dedicate more resources to creating innovative financial products and improving the user experience. This could lead to faster transaction times, better security, and more features for Ink’s users.

Users of Ink and those interested in its ecosystem should watch for announcements regarding new financial products and ecosystem growth. The partnership with Optimism is a significant step for Ink, and it will be interesting to see how this collaboration unfolds in the coming years. Keep an eye on updates from both the Ink Foundation and Optimism for more details.
twitterThread: Ink, incubated by @krakenfx, just upgraded to Optimism’s OP Enterprise Fully Managed infrastructure. Optimism will now run all of Ink’s production infrastructure under a multi-year deal. 🚀
By outsourcing infrastructure to Optimism, the Ink Foundation can focus entirely on ecosystem growth and building new financial products. A strategic win for both teams.

Keep an eye out for new financial products and ecosystem updates from Ink. This fully managed infrastructure deal could unlock faster, more reliable, and more innovative services for users.
